name: Seafood and Yellow Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat margarine in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion and bell pepper until translucent.
2. Pour in water (and some chicken stock) and add garlic. Stir in celery, parsley, salt, and MSG. Let the mixture simmer gently.
3. Add mushrooms and clams to the pot. Cover and bring to a boil over medium-high heat. The seafood juices will create an additional 1/2 cup of liquid.
4. Reduce heat to maintain a very gentle boil. Stir in rice and return to almost no heat. Sprinkle saffron and cover the pot.
5. Cook for 15 minutes, uncovered, until the rice is nearly cooked but still firm at the edges.
6. Gently fold in the seafood mixture and stir again. Return to a simmer, cover, and cook an additional 10 minutes.
7. If the shrimp release too much liquid during cooking, briefly uncover the pot. Taste and adjust seasonings as needed; add more butter or pepper if desired.
(Note: Optional additions include oysters and fresh mushrooms.)
